title: Easter Wreath Craft Class with bubbles
subtitle: Have fun making a cute Easter wreath while sipping on bubbles/mimosa!
description:
Join us here at Wine:30 for a fun crafty evening making an Easter Wreath
Pre-register on line $45.00 includes supplies, instructions and a glass of bubbles.
If you have additional items you would like to add to your wreath as decor, please feel free to bring with you.
